info.english_meaning: to enjoy to be happy to be tired to be distressed
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: dEvAdikasya mittvArTonuvAdaH  ' glepanam = dEnyam ' iti mA.DA.vfttiH  ' glepane ' iti kzIrataraNgiRyAM pAWaH  ' stutyAdO mandate  harze mAdyet mAdayate Rici ' (Slo. 112) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'dyUte pAne taTA strIzu mfgayAyAM ca yo naraH na pramAdyati mohAt…' (BA॰SAM॰288.26).. dyUte ityAdayaH sAmIpye saptamyaH na pramAdyati AtmAnaM vismftya tatrABinivizwo na BavatItyarTaH
'mA jIveByaH pramadaH' (aTarva॰8.1.7) prapUrvo madiranavaDAne vartate anavahito mA sma BUrityAha
'daSa DarmaM na jAnanti DftarAzwra niboDa tAn mattaH pramatta unmattaH…' (BA॰u॰33.101) pramatto'navahitaH
'yanti pramAdamatandrAH' (aTarva॰20.18.3) pramAdaM prakarzeRa mAdayitAraM tasya madakaraM somam iti sAyaRaH
'vimattamiva hi tO tayA nirakurutAm' (E0 brA0 222) ukto'rTaH
'nizevya pAnaM madanIyamuttamaM niSAvivAsezu cirAd vimAdyati' (sOndara0 929) vimAdyati vigatamado Bavati
'unmAdyati sa tu kzipraM taM tu devagrahaM viduH' (BA0 vana0 23047)
'daSa DarmaM na jAnanti…mattaH pramatta unmattaH' (BA0 u0 33102)
'ati janaM vA gacCedudvA mAdyeta' (paYca0 brA0 181110) unmAdyeta unmAdyet unmAdamupeyAt
'kAnana'sminvinA kAntAM cittamunmAdayanti me' (rA0 4197) unmAdayanti unmattamudBrAntaM kurvanti
'yaTedamapyetarhi jYAtInAM yaM garizWe (karmaRi) yuYjanti tamupamadanti' (Sa0 brA0 1421) upamadanti stuvanti
